title: Accessibility Guidelines for Zion Tech Group Website

navigation.description: Ensure all navigation is accessible via keyboard

forms.description: Make all forms accessible and user-friendly

images.description: Ensure images are accessible to all users
requirements: Ensure images don't convey information through color alone
Provide text alternatives for complex images

color.description: Use color in an accessible way
requirements: Don't rely on color alone to convey information
Provide alternative ways to identify elements
